en.name: Level 4 — Abandoned Office
en.shortDescription: An empty office building with blacked-out windows: a major hub where wanderers gather, restock and prepare to go deeper.
en.atmosphere: Quiet corporate spaces, abandoned furniture and fluorescent light, calm near the water dispensers but eerily empty.
en.tips: Stock Almond Water before advancing. Avoid clear (non-blacked-out) windows — they are traps. Several easy exits for retreat.
